hero.subtitle: FluxBot is an AI sales agent that knows your full catalog, recommends products, and closes deals while you sleep. No complicated setup. No depending on your team.
hero.chat_placeholder: Ask about pricing, features or installation...

ceo_letter.headline: We don't sell another chat.
ceo_letter.paragraph: While others build customer support tools, we're building something revolutionary: AI that sells.
ceo_letter.quote: Every product question is someone asking "Should I buy this?" Most stores waste these moments. We capture them.

features_showcase.title: How FluxBot boosts your sales
features_showcase.f1_desc: FluxBot automatically syncs all your products, prices, descriptions, and policies. It uses RAG with vector embeddings to find exactly what each customer needs.
features_showcase.f2_desc: It doesn't just read messages. It tracks browsing behavior, viewed products, and purchase history to understand each visitor's real intent.
features_showcase.f3_desc: Spots upsell opportunities and suggests complementary products during conversations. Like an expert salesperson who never gets it wrong.
features_showcase.f4_desc: Your AI agent keeps selling products all day and all night. No breaks. No vacations. It works hard so you can focus on what matters most.

demo_section.title: Try FluxBot now
demo_section.subtitle: Experience how FluxBot interacts with your customers. This demo uses sample responses.
demo_section.initial_message: Hi, I'm FluxBot. Do you want a demo, pricing info, or installation help?
demo_section.reply_pricing: We have plans starting at $29/mo. Check the pricing section for details.
demo_section.reply_install: Installation is done with a JS snippet. It's live in under 5 minutes.
demo_section.reply_demo: Great. Leave your details on our contact page and we'll set up a guided demo for you.
demo_section.reply_default: I can help with pricing, use cases, and installation. What do you need?

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Under 10 minutes with zero coding required. FluxBot automatically syncs with your store and learns your entire product catalog overnight. Just connect, enable the widget, and your AI salesperson is ready to work.
faq.q2: Will FluxBot understand my products well?
faq.a2: Yes. FluxBot learns your entire product catalog including sizing, compatibility, and which products work together. It uses vector embeddings and RAG to find exactly the information each customer needs.
faq.a3: No. Your plan includes AI replies. If you need more, you pay a small fee per extra reply. You can set spending limits so costs never surprise you.
faq.q4: Does it work with my platform?
faq.a4: FluxBot works with any website: Shopify, WordPress, Webflow, React, Next.js, or any HTML site. You just need to paste a 3-line snippet before </body>.
faq.q5: Can I customize the chatbot's appearance?
faq.a5: Yes. You can change the color, position, welcome message, and widget behavior from the admin panel. All without code.

cta_final.title: Ready to sell with AI?

install_page.title: Install the widget on your site
install_page.subtitle: Configure your snippet and paste it before </body>. The widget loads without blocking the rest of your site.
install_page.step1: Complete Token and Domain in the generator above.
install_page.step2: Click "Validate connection" to verify your domain is authorized.
install_page.step4: Paste it in your HTML before closing the body tag.
install_page.step5: Publish and verify the widget appears.
install_page.step6: Operations are managed in a separate panel.
